grassgoober.name: Grass Goober
grassgoober.description: A grass goober is a goober that lives in grassy areas. They cant jump because theyre plants but they are very happy lil goobers, and they dont like fire. Best friends of the brunk

brunk.name: Brunk
brunk.description: Brunk's are trees that have come alive. Most of the time, they are pretty chill, but when someone enters their territory or hurts their friends, they get angry and whip them. They are weak to fire. Best friend of the grass goober

roboGoober.name: Robo Goober
roboGoober.description: A robot mimicking a goober. Unlike the peaceful grass goober, it will charge at and procede to destroy anything in its line of sight.

wire.name: Wire
wire.description: An object. Chargy is able to travel through wires.

oneway.name: One Way
oneway.description: A block that can only be passed through in one direction.

oneway_locked.name: Locked One Way
oneway_locked.description: A oneway that is locked in place. Buttons do not affect it.

button.name: Button
button.description: A simple trigger. When pressed, changes states of some objects, for example reversing the direction of one way blocks.

gooberworld.name: Goober World
gooberworld.description: Goober world. A planet that has existed for eons, and has had many different major civilizations rise and fall on it. Some of the civilizations were very technologically advanced, many of which had left this world for a better home, others were very primitive, and had either died or evolved into different forms. Orbits the Black Void, a black hole that will eventually consume it in the far future. Half of the planet is a giant forest, the other half is a giant factory, the most efficient factory in the universe, and the only one capable of using plasma as a power source without major consequences.

rocket.name: Rocket
rocket.description: A rocket. Used to travel to different planets.

rocktobot.name: Rocktobot
rocktobot.description: A robot octopus which shoots rocks at anything it can see
